name: McKee Park
description: McKee Park is a place to play pickleball in Starkville, MS. There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Sanderson Center Pickleball Courts
description: Sanderson Center Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Starkville, MS. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Travis Outlaw Gym
description: Travis Outlaw Gym is a place to play pickleball in Starkville, MS. There are 3 indoor wood and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
